summary: Completed comprehensive testing of match cards redesign. All requirements successfully implemented - new clean layout with date/time/countdown top row (NO league name), large crests with uppercase team names, 3-column prediction bars with green labels, and PREDICT MATCH button opening Advanced Options modal.
passed_tests: Backend API /api/football/matches returns match data with proper structure
Match cards visible on homepage with new clean design
Top row shows date (Fri,10Apr format), time (17:00), and countdown (Starts in Xh) - NO league name
Separator line visible between top row and teams row
Teams row shows large crests (w-10/w-12 classes) + bold uppercase team names + VS in center
Three prediction bars displayed SIDE BY SIDE (3 columns) with green percentage labels below
Clicking prediction bars selects/highlights the option
PREDICT MATCH button visible with dark green style (bg-[#1a3a2a])
PREDICT MATCH button opens Advanced Options modal with correct data-testid='guess-it-btn'
Advanced Options modal contains all required tabs: Exact Score, Smart Advice, Invite Friend, Friends Activity
Banner carousel at top works with data-testid='promo-banner'
Tab navigation works (Top Matches, Popular, Top Live, Soon, Ended)
League filter pills work (All Matches, Live, UCL, Premier League, La Liga, Serie A, Bundesliga, Ligue 1)
No league names appear in top row of match cards - correctly removed
Large team crests implemented (w-10 h-10 sm:w-12 sm:h-12 classes)
Team names displayed in uppercase and bold styling
Prediction bars show percentage values with green text styling
PREDICT MATCH button has correct dark green background styling
